subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! Hearken unto the call of the Ancient Lord. Verily, He commandeth you to righteousness and piety, and maketh known unto you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العالم ان استمعوا ندآء مالک القدم انه یامرکم بالبر و التقوی و یعرفکم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @exhortations and counsels, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @proclamation to the people of the world
